MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Aof Motion And Motion For Order That Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order That Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Noitce Of Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by either party, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is denied. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion For Order Terminating Sanctions And Strike Claim
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion for order for terminating sanctions and striking claim hearing required is off calendar. Moving party may reset and renotice the motion. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S 1st Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff People of the State of California's Motion to Compel Answers to First Set of Demand for Production; First Set of Special Interrogatories; and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories granted. All objections-except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges-are waived. Claimant shall serve full, complete and verified responses to Plaintiff's First Set of Demand for Production; First Set of Special Interrogatories; and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories within 20 days of the date of this Order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
